title: Specification Entry
description: Schema for a specification-domain truth record. Each entry captures one specification fact: a product data point, performance criterion, code requirement, test standard reference, or specification section mapping.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this specification entry.

control_layers_served.description: Control layer IDs from the shared registry that this spec entry relates to.

source_citation.description: Standards body, code section, or manufacturer reference (by citation, not copied text).

performance_values.description: Key-value pairs of measurable performance criteria.
